Auto-populate the target attribute with: Auto-populate the target attribute with the value of the field you link it to.
When an attribute rule is added or chang: When an attribute rule is added or changed, data will be synced to Google Merchant Centre via an async job. Note that it may take a while for the update to show up on Merchant Centre, especially if it involves products that have not been synced and approved before.
Use fixed values to populate the target: Use fixed values to populate the target attribute with a value you specify. For example, you can enter a fixed value of 'White' to specify a single colour for all your products.
To ensure your products continue to be a: To ensure your products continue to be approved and promoted by Google, make sure that your product fields include all the required information.
Product data is re-submitted to Google e: Product data is re-submitted to Google every 30 days to ensure that the information in your product listings are up-to-date.
Deleting a rule does\u2019t affect any d: Deleting a rule does’t affect any data that has already been submitted to Google.
Select a Google attribute that you want: Select a Google attribute that you want to manage
Can\u2019t find an appropriate field? <l: Can’t find an appropriate field? <link>Create a new attribute</link>
Choose how to assign a value to the targ: Choose how to assign a value to the target attribute
Use value from existing product field: Use value from existing product field
Create attribute rules to control what p: Create attribute rules to control what product data gets sent to Google and to manage product attributes in bulk.
